name: Cheddary Chicken Potpie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine the soup, 1/2 cup milk, onion, cream cheese, celery, carrots, Parmesan cheese, and salt.
2. Cook and stir until the mixture is hot and the cream cheese has melted.
3. Stir in the chicken and broccoli; heat through.
4. Pour into an ungreased 2-quart baking dish.
5. In a medium bowl, combine the egg, oil, and remaining milk. Add the pancake mix and cheese; blend well.
6. Spoon over the hot chicken mixture.
7. Sprinkle with almonds if desired.
8. Bake, uncovered, at 375°F for 20 to 25 minutes or until golden brown.
